title: Changelog File
description: Schema for changelog entries in the unreleased directory. Supports either a plain array of entries (rc defaults to false) or an object with an optional top-level 'rc' flag.

oneOf.description: List of changelog entries (rc defaults to false)
Changelog file with optional release candidate flag

rc.description: When true, creates a release candidate version (e.g., 3.15.0-rc0). If the current version is already an RC of the same target, the RC counter is incremented (e.g., 3.15.0-rc1).

summary.description: Description of the change. Use multi-line format for longer descriptions.

type.description: Type of change determines version bump: fix/chore (patch), feat/internal (minor), break (major)

ChangelogType.title: Changelog Type
ChangelogType.description: The type of change: fix/chore → patch, feat/internal → minor, break → major
